takeaways.title: Mostly playful thread
takeaways.detail: Sentiment is overwhelmingly neutral/positive (only 1 negative comment out of 161, and 2 flagged as toxic).

takeaways.title: The "science" framing is the main riff
takeaways.detail: Most comments pile onto biology/genetics "theories" and category jokes (36 combined mentions across those terms).

takeaways.title: Requests are about category coverage
takeaways.detail: Suggestions are low volume (7 total), but they cluster around missing categories/items (e.g. "you forgot yaoi").
